meaning: n.管,导管,烟斗,管乐器,笛声vt.以管输送,吹哨子vi.吹笛,尖叫
examples: Water gushed out of the pipe.
Copper pipe is sold in lengths.
Such copper pipe now connects telephones, cable television, computers and all manner of other information processing gear.
Yet, another story says the hunters smelled gas, banged a pipe into the ground and then lit it.
